Object.Name: Sensor Group Device Capabilities
Object.Description1: This object is used to notify the user about the capabilities supported by the device in respect to Distributed Sensot Group functionality.

Item.Name: Remote Sensor Management capabilities
Item.Description: Specifies the capabilities supported by the device to manage and store remote sensors information retrieved from the sensor group as a Bit Mask: Bit 0: Dynamic mapping support - Remote sensors can be discovered as new messages are received. If explicit mapping is required, new corresponding object instances will be automatically created Bit 1: Implicit mapping support - Sensor state is maintained on an implementation specific internal database instead of being reflected into local objects Bit 2: Auto clear support - Automatic clear to the default value is supported after validity time is expired Bit 3: Transaction support Bit 4: Transaction support - Automatic fallback

Item.Name: Max number of explicit sensors
Item.Description: The maximum number of sensors and sensor states the device can instantiate. This value is calculated by the count of all different sensor objects associated with a sensor groups. This value shall be set to 0 if explicit mapping is not supported On uCiFi compliant devices support for static explicit mapping is mandatory.

Item.Name: Max number of implicit sensors
Item.Description: The maximum number of sensors and sensor states the device can keep in memory. This value is calculated by the count of all different sensor objects associated with a sensor groups. This value shall be set to 0 if implicit mapping is not supported.

Item.Name: Data Fusion Capabilities
Item.Description: Specifies the data fusion algorithms supported by the device represented as a bitmask: Bit 0: OR Bit 1: AND Bit 2: ADD Bit 3: MAX Bit 4: MIN Bit 5: LAST - The last value reported by any sensor in the group becomes the group state value Bit 6: Reserved (Custom 1) Bit 7: Reserved (Custom 2) If the device supports no fusion capabilities, this resource should be set to 0.

Item.Name: Reset DSG objects
Item.Description: When executed, trigger a complete wipe of the distributed sensor groups already commissioned

Item.Name: Transaction start
Item.Description: If this resource is implemented, before altering any Distributed Sensor Group instance using a create, delete, or write operation, a transaction shall be initiated by writing a random value in this resource. If the transaction end is not written with the same value before the timeout expires, the transaction shall be aborted.

Item.Name: Transaction end
Item.Description: If this resource is implemented, it shall be written with the same value that has been previously written to the transaction start resorce in order to close the current transaction

Item.Name: Transaction timeout
Item.Description: The timeout in seconds after which a transaction that has not been closed shall be aborted. Default = 600 s If a timeout happens the device will set an alarm status and may eventually revert, if supported, to the previous state

Item.Name: Transaction error
Item.Description: This resource is set to true when a transaction is aborted and is automatically cleared when a new transaction is started
